verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are in a heavenly celebration It's a glorious union To unite the bride from every nation The redeem church of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The feast of the great overcomers I will not let it pass me by A new song the bride of Christ to sing Let the redeem shout and praise the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We'll sing the songs we are triumphant With tears of joy we praise our King The feast of victorious overcomers Only the redeem shall enter in
